# services.zabbixAgent

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.zabbixAgent`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.zabbixAgent.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Zabbix Agent. |
| `services.zabbixAgent.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Packages to be added to the Zabbix {env}`PATH`. Typically used to add executables for scripts, but can be anything. |
| `services.zabbixAgent.listen.ip` | `string` | List of comma delimited IP addresses that the agent should listen on. |
| `services.zabbixAgent.listen.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Agent will listen on this port for connections from the server. |
| `services.zabbixAgent.modules` | `attribute set of package` | A set of modules to load. |
| `services.zabbixAgent.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for the Zabbix Agent. |
| `services.zabbixAgent.package` | `package` | The agent package to use. |
| `services.zabbixAgent.server` | `string` | The IP address or hostname of the Zabbix server to connect to. |
| `services.zabbixAgent.settings` | `attribute set of (signed integer or string or list of string)` | Zabbix Agent configuration. Refer to <https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/current/manual/appendix/config/zabbix_agentd> for details on supported values. |
